content.query:
SELECT
'lp_appointment_set' as event_type
,'lp' as data_source
,lower(app.Division) as division
,lower(cst.CustomerID) as Prospect_ID
,lower(lds.LeadID) as Lead_ID
,lower(cst.Email) as email_id
,case 
    when cst.[Phone] is not null then '+1'+Phone
    else cst.[Phone]
end as [phone_id]
,cst.[FirstName] as first_name
,cst.[LastName] as last_name
,cst.[Address1] as address1
,cst.[Address2] as address2
,cst.[City] as city
,cst.[State] as [state]
,trim(str(cst.[Zip])) as zip
,app.SetDate as set_date
,app.ApptDate as appointment_date
,lds.EntryDate as entry_date
,lower(srs.LeadSubSourceID) as lead_subsource_id
,lower(srs.LeadSubSource) as lead_subsource
,lower(srs.[SourceCode]) as lead_sourcecode
,dbo.fnConvertUTCtoEST (getdate()) as [timestamp]
FROM
EDW.FACT_LEAD lds
,EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER cst
,EDW.FACT_APPOINTMENT app
,EDW.DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE srs
WHERE
lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
and lds.LeadID = app.LeadID
and lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
and app.SetDate is not null
and lds.ApptSet = 'True'
and DATEDIFF(DAY,CAST( app.ApptDate AS Date ),cast(dbo.fnConvertUtcToEST(GETDATE()) as DATE)) = 0

select * from ODS.LP_HSI_prd_Products where Active = 'True'



select count(1), EntryDate from EDW.FACT_LEAD where Division = 'PHI' group by EntryDate order by EntryDate desc

select * from EDW.FACT_LEAD where Division = 'HSI' and LeadID = 'HSI-248752'

select * from EDW.DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE where LeadSubSourceID = 'HSI-4891'


select * from EDW.DIM_PRODUCT where ProductID = 'HSI-2'
